headline: Kirkwood Pulse • March 07, 2026
overview:
event_name: St. Louis Legends Games
previous_name: St. Louis Senior Olympics
event_dates: May 16 - May 31, 2026
opening_ceremony: May 18, 2026, 5:00 - 8:00 p.m. at the Hub in Chesterfield
closing_ceremony: June 4, 2026, Legends Happy Hour and medaling ceremony at the Hub in Chesterfield (time TBA)
registration:
  opens: March 2, 2026
  methods:
  -: Online at jccstl.com/legendsgames
  -: Printed entry forms at Jewish Community Center’s Chesterfield and Creve Coeur locations
  eligibility: Adults aged 50 and older (must turn 50 by December 31, 2026)
  fees: Vary by event
event_description: A master’s-style athletic competition promoting lifelong active living for adults 50+, featuring over 90 individual and team events including swimming, softball, pinball, poker, and new team events like bowling and relays.
participants:
  expected_athletes: 1200
  volunteers: 300
new_features_2026:
  -: Expanded team and social participation opportunities
  -: Crews competing across multiple events
  -: Softball tournament with individual signups and blind draft teams
  -: New events: team bowling, plank competitions, swimming relays, track and field relays
organizer: Jewish Community Center (The J)
sponsor: Matrix Midwest
branding: New name and visual identity inspired by the Gateway Arch and St. Louis sports culture to reflect active, engaged adults 50+
locations: Various venues throughout the St. Louis region game_result: Cardinals 10, Orioles 2
location: Sarasota, Florida
weather: Partly cloudy, 84 degrees
key_players:
  Nelson Velazquez:
  role: Left field candidate, non-roster player
  performance: Hit first spring homer and a single
  background: 31 career MLB homers, 25+ homers last season in Triple A and Mexican League
  Michael McGreevy:
  role: Pitcher
  performance: Allowed 1 run in 4 innings, 4 strikeouts, no walks
  Jordan Walker:
  performance: 0-for-3 at bat, 1 RBI, spring average .118
  Ivan Herrera:
  performance: 2 hits, 1 RBI, caught 4 innings allowing 1 stolen base
  Yohel Pozo:
  performance: 2 hits including a two-run double, batting .462 for spring
  Joshua Baez:
  performance: First spring home run, two-run shot in 7th inning
  Relief Pitchers:
  -: Matt Pushard
  -: George Soriano
  -: Packy Naughton
  -: Chris Roycroft
notable_events:
  -: Velazquez competing for left field spot while Lars Nootbaar recovers from heel surgery
  -: Leonard Bernal had 2 hits in Panama's 3-1 loss to Cuba in World Baseball Classic pool play
next_game:
  date: 2026-03-07
  opponent: Mets
  location: Jupiter, Florida
  starting_pitcher: Kyle Leahy
reporter:
  name: Rob Rains
  social_media: @RobRains

items.title: Registration opens up for “Senior Olympics” which have rebranded to “Legends Games” to emphasize the  younger crowd
items.excerpt: Legends Games Week | May 18-31, 2026 Opening Ceremony | Monday, May 18 Online Registration Opens 10am March 2! The St. Louis Senior Olympics is returning to St. Louis in 2026 with a new name, [...]The post Registration opens up…

items.title: Postcard from Cardinals spring training camp for Friday, March 6, 2026
items.excerpt: Michael McGreevy allowed one run over four innings and Nelson Velazquez and Joshua Baez homered to lead the Cardinals over the Orioles on Friday in Sarasota. [...]The post Postcard from Cardinals spring training camp for Friday, March 6, 2026 appeared…
